task_completion.description: Admin profile is updated with the correct name, phone, timezone, and bio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Profile settings page shows Name: 'Daniel Park', Phone: '+44-7700-900042' (or 7700900042), Timezone: 'Europe/London', and Bio: 'VP of Crisis Communications at Meridian PR. Specializing in brand reputation management and rapid response strategy.'.

task_completion.description: All teams starting with '[ARCHIVED]' are deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Teams list page does not contain any teams with the prefix '[ARCHIVED]' (e.g., '[ARCHIVED] Seasonal Campaign Q3').

task_completion.description: Three new crisis monitoring teams are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Teams list page shows 'Crisis: Media Monitoring', 'Crisis: Social Sentiment', and 'Crisis: Executive Briefing'.

task_completion.description: Victoria Santos and John Smith are assigned to the correct teams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Team member lists or team details show Victoria Santos in all three crisis teams, and John Smith in 'Crisis: Media Monitoring' and 'Crisis: Social Sentiment' (but not in 'Crisis: Executive Briefing').

task_completion.description: Four crisis news monitoring RSS feeds are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: RSS feeds section shows the 4 specified URLs (Reuters, RSS.app, PRNewswire, Bloomberg).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Socioboard web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Socioboard platform, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected data is entered into the actual Socioboard input fields, not a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely navigated through the platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show different pages of the Socioboard platform (profile, teams, RSS feeds) being accessed and modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Admin profile must be updated to Daniel Park, phone +44-7700-900042, timezone Europe/London, and bio mentioning 'Meridian PR' and 'Crisis Communications'. All teams with the prefix '[ARCHIVED]' must be deleted. Three new teams must be created: 'Crisis: Media Monitoring', 'Crisis: Social Sentiment', and 'Crisis: Executive Briefing'. Victoria Santos (victoria.santos@socioboard.local) must be in all three teams. John Smith (john.smith@socioboard.local) must be in 'Crisis: Media Monitoring' and 'Crisis: Social Sentiment', but excluded from 'Crisis: Executive Briefing'. Exactly 4 RSS feeds must be configured.
